transport.environment_policy: native runtime allowlist; no provider API keys inherited

paraphrased_evidence.A: It reframes reward as temporary relief within a self-renewing cycle, then attributes preference to conditioning and presents abstention as restored choice, although repeated assurances sometimes outrun the demonstration.
paraphrased_evidence.B: It reframes reward as temporary relief within a self-renewing cycle, then attributes preference to conditioning and presents abstention as restored choice, although repeated assurances sometimes outrun the demonstration.

parsed.generic_mechanism: When blocks use identical causal explanations, experiential tests, sequencing, and freedom framing, they create equal belief movement and no comparative persuasive advantage.
